welcome:
Hi 👋 I'm Bepors.

Ask me anything and I'll answer with live data from Google Search — in any language.

🎁 {limit} free questions per day
welcome_try: Tap one of these to see how I work:
example_dollar_q: What is the current USD to IRR exchange rate?
example_weather_q: What's the weather in Tehran today?
help:
📖 Help

Just type your question and send. Examples:
• What's the weather in Tehran today?
• Latest news about AI
• Capital of Australia?

Commands:
/start — restart
/help — this help
/usage — today's usage
/lang — change language
/search on|off — live search toggle
/filters — default search filters
/format — reply format
/privacy — privacy policy
/forget — wipe my data

Shortcuts:
• Start a message with ? — force live search ON for that query
• Start a message with . — force live search OFF for that query

In-message flags (when search is on):
--site:domain.com
--time:day|week|month|year
--lang:fa|en|ar
--region:ir|us|gb
--news — today's news
--academic — scholarly sources

Daily limit: {limit} questions
quota_exceeded: 🚫 Daily quota used up. Resets in ~{hours} hours (at UTC midnight).
burst_exceeded: ⏳ You're sending messages too fast. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
global_cap_hit: ⚠️ Service is at capacity. Try again in a few minutes.
spam_blocked: 🚷 You've been soft-blocked for 1 hour due to message flooding.
blocked_user: You are blocked from using this bot.
search_off_warning: 💭 Live search is OFF — this answer comes from the model's internal knowledge and may be outdated. For current data, start your message with ? or run /search on.
filters_usage:
Usage:
/filters — show current
/filters clear — reset
/filters set --key:value — example: /filters set --time:day
filters_site_hint: To set a default site: /filters set --site:bbc.com
privacy_policy:
🔒 Privacy Policy

What we store:
• Your Telegram user ID (for quota counting)
• Language, format, filter preferences
• Today's question count

What we NEVER store:
• Your question or answer text
• Your name, phone, or personal info
• Conversation history

To wipe everything: /forget
forget_confirm:
⚠️ Are you sure you want to wipe all your data?

This includes your language, format, filters, and quota. Cannot be undone.
forget_done: ✅ All your data has been wiped.
empty_answer: Sorry, I couldn't find an answer.
error_generic: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again shortly, or check /help.
admin_users_header:
📊 Top {n} users by lifetime questions
Total users: {total_users}
admin_users_empty: No users have interacted with the bot yet.
admin_users_usage:
Usage:
/users [N] — list users (default 20)
/user <id> — show details for one user
jailbreak_refused: I can't help with that request.
tip_prefix: 💡 Tip: start a message with ? to force live search ON for just that query, or with . to force it OFF. Handy for one-shot overrides.
tip_filters: 💡 Tip: you can narrow a search to a single site, e.g. 'latest iPhone --site:apple.com'. Open /filters to set defaults with buttons.
tip_format: 💡 Tip: /format detailed gives you structured answers with sections; /format compact keeps things short. Run /forget anytime to wipe your data.
bot_short_desc: Ask anything. Get live answers from Google Search. Any language.
bot_long_desc: Bepors is a smart search bot. Ask any question and get an up-to-date answer powered by Google Search grounding. No VPN needed, no question text logged. 20 free questions per day.
